landing.heroSubtitle: The all-in-one platform for community savings groups, alumni unions, village associations, and church groups across Africa and the diaspora
landing.trustedBy: Trusted by community leaders across Africa and the diaspora
landing.featuresSubtitle: Built by Africans, for African community groups. We understand how njangis, tontines, and associations actually work.
landing.featureMembershipDesc: Track members, roles, and standing. Proxy management for elders. One account, unlimited groups.
landing.featureContributionsDesc: Record dues, donations, and savings rotations. Auto-reminders for outstanding balances. Full transparency.
landing.featureMeetingsDesc: Schedule meetings, record attendance, capture decisions and action items. Searchable history.
landing.featureCommsDesc: Announcements, notifications, and group messaging. Reach members via app, email, or SMS.
landing.featureFinanceDesc: Real-time dashboards, treasurer reports, and audit trails. See exactly where every franc goes.
landing.featureBilingualDesc: Full English and French support. Each member chooses their language. Perfect for Cameroon and beyond.
landing.savingsFeatureDesc: Whether you call it Njangi, Ajo, Susu, Stokvel, Chama, or Sou-sou, we've got you covered. Track contributions, rotations, and collections with full transparency.
landing.electionsFeatureDesc: Run officer elections with anonymous ballots, pass motions, and conduct polls. Fair, transparent, and auditable.
landing.documentFeatureDesc: Store your constitution, financial statements, and meeting documents securely. Version-controlled and always accessible.
landing.memberCardFeatureDesc: QR-coded digital cards that verify membership instantly. Download, share, and present with pride.
landing.builtForYouDesc: VillageClaq serves community groups in every corner of Africa and wherever the diaspora calls home.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Get your group up and running in minutes
landing.step1Desc: Set up in 30 seconds. Choose your group type, currency, and meeting schedule.
landing.step2Desc: Share a link or send invitations. Members join with one tap.
landing.step3Desc: Record contributions, take attendance, capture minutes. Everything in one place.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when your group grows.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join 500+ community groups across 11 countries already using VillageClaq to stay connected and accountable.
landing.footerTagline: Bringing African communities together, one group at a time.
landing.footerBuiltWith: Built with love in Cameroon for the world

contact.faqSubtitle: Check if your question is answered here
contact.faq1Q: How do I create a group?
contact.faq1A: Sign up for free, then click 'Create Group' from your dashboard. Setup takes under 30 seconds.
contact.faq2A: Go to your group settings and share the invitation link, or send email invitations directly from the app.
contact.faq3A: Yes. We use Supabase with row-level security, encrypted connections, and your data is never shared with third parties.
contact.faq4A: VillageClaq is free for groups up to 25 members. Paid plans start at $9/month for larger groups.

about.title: About VillageClaq
about.story: Built by Africans, for African Communities
about.storyDesc: VillageClaq was born from a simple observation: millions of Africans manage community finances through trust and paper. We're bringing transparency, efficiency, and pride to every savings circle, alumni union, and village association — from Bamenda to Brooklyn.
about.missionDesc: To empower every African community group with world-class financial management tools, preserving the traditions of mutual aid while building trust through transparency.
about.teamDesc: A passionate team building the future of community finance in Africa.
about.panAfricanDesc: VillageClaq serves communities in every corner of Africa and wherever the diaspora calls home. Whether you run a Njangi in Cameroon, an Ajo in Nigeria, a Susu in Ghana, a Stokvel in South Africa, or a Chama in Kenya — VillageClaq speaks your language.
about.problemDesc: Across Africa, community groups manage millions in contributions using paper notebooks, WhatsApp screenshots, and cash in envelopes. When records are unclear, disputes arise and trust erodes — the very foundation these groups are built on.
about.solutionDesc: One platform for members, payments, attendance, meetings, and reports. Transparent, organized, and accessible from any phone — so every franc is accounted for and every member feels included.
about.valueTransparencyDesc: Every transaction visible. Every decision documented. Trust through openness.
about.valueCommunityDesc: We build for the group, not the individual. Every feature strengthens the collective.
about.valueAfricaDesc: We understand African communities because we are one. Multi-currency, multilingual, mobile-first.
about.valueSimpleDesc: If a village elder can't use it on a basic phone, we haven't finished building it.
about.ctaSubtitle: Start free. No credit card required.

bodies.acceptance: By accessing or using VillageClaq, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our platform.
bodies.services: VillageClaq provides a multi-tenant SaaS platform for African community groups to manage contributions, events, attendance, and group finances. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue any feature at any time.
bodies.accounts: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You must provide accurate information during registration and keep your profile up to date.
bodies.conduct: You agree not to use VillageClaq for any unlawful purpose, to harass other users, to distribute malware, or to attempt to gain unauthorized access to other accounts or systems.
bodies.content: You retain ownership of content you post on VillageClaq. By posting content, you grant us a non-exclusive license to display and distribute that content within the platform.
bodies.privacy: Your use of VillageClaq is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review it to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
bodies.payments: Certain features may require a paid subscription. All fees are non-refundable unless otherwise stated. We may change pricing with 30 days notice to existing subscribers.
bodies.termination: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time through your profile settings.
bodies.liability: VillageClaq is provided on an 'as is' basis. We shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform.
bodies.governing: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Maryland, United States. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Maryland.
bodies.changes: We may update these terms from time to time. We will notify you of material changes via email or in-app notification. Continued use constitutes acceptance of updated terms.
bodies.contact: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at legal@villageclaq.com or through our contact form.

bodies.collection: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, and profile details. We also collect usage data, device information, and cookies when you interact with our platform.
bodies.usage: We use your information to provide and improve our services, process transactions, send notifications, and communicate with you about your account and groups.
bodies.retention: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. You may request deletion of your data at any time.
bodies.rights: You have the right to access, correct, export, or delete your personal data. You may also object to processing or request restriction of processing.
bodies.cookies: We use essential cookies to keep you logged in and remember your preferences. We use analytics cookies to understand how our platform is used. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.
bodies.thirdParty: We use trusted third-party services including Supabase for data storage, Vercel for hosting, and payment processors for transactions. These services have their own privacy policies.
bodies.security: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit and at rest, row-level security policies, and regular security audits to protect your data.
bodies.children: VillageClaq is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us.
bodies.changes: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or in-app notification at least 30 days before they take effect.
bodies.contact: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@villageclaq.com or through our contact form.
